prompt: {"type":"UI/UX design system showcase board","theme":"dark mode, nature-inspired, luminous iridescent aesthetic","language":"Chinese","canvas":{"aspect_ratio":"square poster","background":"deep midnight navy to black with subtle glow","style":"premium futuristic presentation board with thin neon-blue panel outlines, glossy highlights, soft bloom, and high contrast"},"header":{"title":"自然灵感 UI\n{argument name=\"system title\" default=\"蝴蝶虹彩\"}\nUI/UX 设计系统","description":"{argument name=\"chinese description\" default=\"从蝴蝶翅膀中汲取灵感，将结构色的虹彩光泽与深邃蓝融入界面设计，创造轻盈、灵动、充满生命力的数字体验。\"}","hero_image":"an oversized, ultra-detailed glowing butterfly wing in electric blue, violet, and iridescent cyan filling the upper-right half, with visible vein structure, translucent edges, spark-like particles, and a second blurred wing behind it"},"layout":{"sections":[{"title":"1. 设计灵感","position":"upper left below header","count":4,"labels":["iridescent butterfly wing macro","blue-purple wing texture close-up","light refraction prism flare","butterfly wing cell pattern"]},{"title":"2. 关键词","position":"upper right below hero","count":5,"labels":["虹彩","灵动","轻盈","深邃","自然"],"icon_style":"simple glowing line icons inside rounded dark cards"},{"title":"3. 色彩系统","position":"mid left","subsections":[{"title":"主色","count":3,"labels":["大闪蝶蓝 #1E5BFF","虹彩紫 #7A5CFF","天空光 #00E6FF"]},{"title":"中性色","count":3,"labels":["午夜黑 #060F19","柔和海军蓝 #141A2E","珍珠白 #F3F6FC"]},{"title":"强调色与渐变","count":2,"labels":["彩虹光泽","蝴蝶光芒"]}],"visual":"circular color swatches and gradient spheres with Chinese labels beneath"},{"title":"4. 排版","position":"mid right","count":1,"labels":["Aa Poppins Light / Regular / Medium / SemiBold"],"visual":"large white Aa on dark card"},{"title":"5. 应用图标","position":"left center","count":1,"text":"{argument name=\"app name\" default=\"Winglet\"} 轻盈。灵动。优雅。","visual":"glowing butterfly app icon beside app name"},{"title":"6. UI 组件","position":"center","subsections":[{"title":"按钮","count":3,"labels":["主要按钮","次要按钮","玻璃质感"]},{"title":"图标","count":2,"labels":["心形收藏","发光圆环"]},{"title":"开关","count":1,"labels":["开关"]}],"visual":"rounded blue buttons, neon icon buttons, and a glowing toggle on a dark panel"},{"title":"其他元素","position":"right center","count":4,"labels":["搜索框","标签 New","进度条 (72%)","卡片 Blue Morpho"],"visual":"small utility UI widgets in a compact horizontal card"},{"title":"7. 移动端 UI","position":"lower left","count":3,"labels":["搜索页面","带有大型蝴蝶插图的今日页面","带有波形图的音频播放页面"],"visual":"three smartphone mockups with rounded corners, dark interface, blue-violet butterfly visuals"},{"title":"8. 网页设计预览","position":"lower right","count":1,"labels":["光之生命"],"visual":"desktop landing page mockup with butterfly hero image, top navigation, bright blue call-to-action button, and Chinese body text"},{"title":"9. 视觉背景","position":"bottom full width","count":4,"labels":["flowing light ribbon background 1","swirling iridescent vortex","flowing light ribbon background 2","radiant crystalline burst"],"visual":"four elongated rectangular background samples in purple, blue, and cyan"}],"footer":{"count":1,"text":"源于自然的设计，为体验而生。","center_icon":"small butterfly icon"}},"art_direction":{"materials":"glassmorphism, neon edge lighting, smooth gradients, subtle reflections","colors":"electric blue, indigo, violet, cyan, white","composition":"clean grid with 9 numbered content sections, generous spacing, thin rounded borders, and a dominant butterfly hero image","render_quality":"highly polished, crisp typography, premium Behance-style design system board"}}
translatedPrompt: {"type":"UI/UX 设计系统展示项目","theme":"深色模式，自然灵感，发光虹彩美学","language":"中文","canvas":{"aspect_ratio":"方形海报","background":"深午夜蓝至黑色，带有微妙光晕","style":"高级未来感展示项目，配有纤细的霓虹蓝面板轮廓、光泽高光、柔和光晕及高对比度"},"header":{"title":"自然灵感 UI\n{argument name=\"system title\" default=\"蝴蝶虹彩\"}\nUI/UX 设计系统","description":"{argument name=\"chinese description\" default=\"从蝴蝶翅膀中汲取灵感，将结构色的虹彩光泽与深邃蓝融入界面设计，创造轻盈、灵动、充满生命力的数字体验。\"}","hero_image":"一个超细节的发光蝴蝶翅膀，呈现电光蓝、紫罗兰色和虹彩青色，占据右上角一半区域，可见脉络结构、半透明边缘、火花状粒子，后方有第二个模糊的翅膀"},"layout":{"sections":[{"title":"1. 设计灵感","position":"左上角，标题下方","count":4,"labels":["虹彩蝴蝶翅膀微距","蓝紫色翅膀纹理特写","光折射棱镜光晕","蝴蝶翅膀细胞图案"]},{"title":"2. 关键词","position":"右上角，主图下方","count":5,"labels":["虹彩","灵动","轻盈","深邃","自然"],"icon_style":"圆角深色卡片内的简约发光线条图标"},{"title":"3. 色彩系统","position":"中左","subsections":[{"title":"主色","count":3,"labels":["大闪蝶蓝 #1E5BFF","虹彩紫 #7A5CFF","天空光 #00E6FF"]},{"title":"中性色","count":3,"labels":["午夜黑 #060F19","柔和海军蓝 #141A2E","珍珠白 #F3F6FC"]},{"title":"强调色与渐变","count":2,"labels":["彩虹光泽","蝴蝶光芒"]}],"visual":"圆形色板和渐变球体，下方附有中文标签"},{"title":"4. 排版","position":"中右","count":1,"labels":["Aa Poppins Light / Regular / Medium / SemiBold"],"visual":"深色卡片上的大号白色 Aa"},{"title":"5. 应用图标","position":"左中","count":1,"text":"{argument name=\"app name\" default=\"Winglet\"} 轻盈。灵动。优雅。","visual":"应用名称旁的发光蝴蝶应用图标"},{"title":"6. UI 组件","position":"中心","subsections":[{"title":"按钮","count":3,"labels":["主要按钮","次要按钮","玻璃质感"]},{"title":"图标","count":2,"labels":["心形收藏","发光圆环"]},{"title":"开关","count":1,"labels":["开关"]}],"visual":"深色面板上的圆角蓝色按钮、霓虹图标按钮及发光开关"},{"title":"其他元素","position":"右中","count":4,"labels":["搜索框","标签 New","进度条 (72%)","卡片 Blue Morpho"],"visual":"紧凑水平卡片中的小型实用 UI 组件"},{"title":"7. 移动端 UI","position":"左下","count":3,"labels":["搜索页面","带有大型蝴蝶插图的今日页面","带有波形图的音频播放页面"],"visual":"三款圆角智能手机样机，深色界面，蓝紫色蝴蝶视觉效果"},{"title":"8. 网页设计预览","position":"右下","count":1,"labels":["光之生命"],"visual":"桌面端落地页样机，包含蝴蝶主图、顶部导航、亮蓝色行动号召按钮及中文正文"},{"title":"9. 视觉背景","position":"底部全宽","count":4,"labels":["流光丝带背景 1","漩涡虹彩","流光丝带背景 2","光芒晶体爆发"],"visual":"四个紫色、蓝色和青色的长方形背景样本"}],"footer":{"count":1,"text":"源于自然的设计，为体验而生。","center_icon":"小型蝴蝶图标"}},"art_direction":{"materials":"玻璃拟态、霓虹边缘光、平滑渐变、微妙反射","colors":"电光蓝、靛蓝、紫罗兰、青色、白色","composition":"整洁的网格布局，包含 9 个带编号的内容板块，充足的留白，纤细的圆角边框，以及占据主导地位的蝴蝶主图","render_quality":"高度精致，排版清晰，高级 Behance 风格设计系统项目"}}

breakdown.creativeCore: Iridescent Butterfly UI System 项目：这是一个精致的深色模式中文 UI/UX 设计系统展示项目，采用发光的蝴蝶主题，适用于设计案例研究、作品集封面及风格系统展示。
breakdown.subject: 界面
breakdown.text: 包含标注/说明；文字是主视觉
breakdown.bestUse: 直播带货界面、社交电商、移动端商品页

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a UI/界面 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: close-up, grid, horizontal]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: premium]。

Lighting and camera:
[参考光线镜头: neon, high contrast]。

Text requirements:
包含标注/说明；文字是主视觉。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
